operand.name: Most Recent HPV Test Is Positive
Date Of Most Recent HPV Test

operand.value: Assess ablation eligibility — ALL must be true:
1. No suspicion of invasive or glandular disease
2. Transformation zone fully visible (TZ Type 1 or 2)
3. Lesion does not extend into endocervical canal beyond probe reach
If ALL criteria met → Thermal ablation or cryotherapy
If ANY criterion NOT met → Excision (LEEP/LLETZ)

then.value: Refer to oncology — cervical cancer diagnosed
Treatment not indicated at this time
Treatment already performed — see FollowUpDecision for retest timing

operand.value: Ablation may be acceptable if transformation zone is fully visible
and lesion is within probe reach.
Assess transformation zone to determine ablation eligibility.
If eligible: thermal ablation (preferred) or cryotherapy.
